title: Mechanical Colonies
description: Modpack with a main fokus on Create and Minecolonies
body:
A modpack based around Create + many of its addons and Minecolonies. The pack also ave a number of decoraions and qualety of life mods like chipped and quark. 

In addion to that it also has a bunch of ather cool mods like Tinkers Construkt and Applied Energistics 2

This modpack was mainly uploaded to allow me to get updates to my friends easyer so dont exect to much from this pack

Create interactive is icluded in the pack but disabled by default since I find it to be quit buggy and unstable




The following mods can't be found on modrinth and are included for compatability resons or there just neat: 

ConnectedTexturesMod by tterrag1098 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm

Domum Ornamentum by OrionOnline https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/domum-ornamentum

Multi-Piston by Raycoms https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/multi-piston

Storage Drawers by Texelsaur https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers

Block UI by Raycoms https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockui

Create: Broken Bad by jetpacker06 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad

Integrated API by CraisinLord https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/integrated-api

Moonlight Lib by MehVahdJukaar https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/selene
